name: Pesto Avocado Torta
recipeInstructions:
Prepare pesto: Blend all ingredients in a blender or food processor until smooth.
Line a 9 x 5 x 3-inch loaf pan with foil. Beat the cream cheese and butter together until smooth. Spoon about 1 1/2 cups of the cream cheese mixture into the bottom of the loaf pan; spread evenly. Spread pesto over the cream cheese layer. Spoon another 1 cup of cream cheese mixture over the pesto, spreading evenly.
Halve, seed, and peel the avocados. Cut each half into 8 slices but do not pull apart. Lay the sliced avocado halves on the cream cheese layer and top with the remaining cream cheese mixture. Cover and refrigerate 6 to 8 hours or overnight.
Thirty minutes before serving, lift the torta from the loaf pan and remove the foil. Serve with large slices of French bread.
